Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log and identify patterns sequences choices loops concurrency The goal is to produce a POWL model

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First observe the overall process All cases start with OR then MS QS Then AS appears but there are variations some cases have IQC and multiple AS like rework loop some have TST and possibly RT retest loop some skip IQC entirely some skip LB Also note that after TST there is PK then LB optional then DP then D

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start OR MS QS always sequential Cases show OR MS QS in order no concurrency so sequential

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then AS but there is a loop involving AS and IQC In cases 1 2 3 5 we see AS then IQC then AS again maybe multiple times In case 4 AS is done without IQC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This suggests a loop do AS then optionally do IQC and then back to AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In case 3 AS IQC AS IQC AS so two IQC between AS So it is a loop execute AS then may execute IQC and then repeat AS

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we set A AS B IQC then the loop would be do AS then either exit or do IQC and then AS again That matches after AS you can either exit go to TST or do IQC and then AS again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What about cases without IQC Then they simply exit after first AS So it is an optional loop

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then TST after the AS loop we have TST Then possibly RT and then TST again in cases 1 3 5 and in case 5 even multiple RT TST cycles

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So that is another loop TST then either exit or do RT and then TST again

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then after TST loop we have PK then LB then DP D But LB is optional skipped in case 2

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So that is a choice do LB or skip it So either LB or silent transition

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After PK there is a choice between LB and skip but both lead to DP then D So after PK then optional LB then DP then D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also check if any concurrency The activities after QS only AS loop and TST loop are sequential No parallel activities from the log So all is sequential with loops and a choice for LB

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will create activities OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB DP D and silent for skip

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define as loop LOOP AS IQC tst loop LOOP TST RT lb choice XOR LB tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the sequence is OR to MS to QS to as loop to tst loop to PK to lb choice to DP to D

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We can represent this as a StrictPartialOrder with nodes being these sub models and edges ordering them sequentially Since they must be executed in order we add edges from each to the next

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Our loop structures handle that as loop can exit after first AS making IQC optional tst loop can exit after first TST making RT optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop AS IQC can produce AS IQC AS IQC AS exactly matching case 3 Similarly for TST RT

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The overall model is a partial order over the following nodes OR MS QS AS loop TST loop PK LB choice DP D With order OR to MS MS to QS QS to AS loop AS loop to TST loop TST loop to PK PK to LB choice LB choice to DP DP to D
